title: Section 22
content: Notwithstanding anything contained in section 21, the Central Government may direct 1[every Institute] to-- (a) set up an endowment fund and any other fund for specified purpose; (b) transfer money from its Fund to endowment fund or any other fund.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2021, s. 23, for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
